title: ✴️ Recursive Symmetry
name: Recursive Symmetry
what_it_is: Symmetry that contains symmetry that contains more symmetry—used in sacred geometry, mythic sigils, and dimensional overlays.
how_to_use: her crown radiates recursive symmetry—each jewel echoes the shape of the whole
his body structure is recursive—limbs composed of smaller copies of the torso
animation_behavior: Fractal zoom symmetry, bloom-repetition on gesture, scale-shift layering ---
